# GitCity — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org — machine-readable site summary for AI assistants

# About
GitCity (https://gitcity.natrajx.in) is a free, open-source web app that
visualises GitHub contribution history as an interactive isometric 3D city
skyline and a driveable city simulation.

# Creator
Name: Natraj X
Website: https://natrajx.in
GitHub: https://github.com/natrajx

# Key features
- Isometric 3D skyline: every contribution day = one building, height = commit count
- City simulation: driveable Three.js city built from real GitHub data
- Bird's Eye heatmap view
- 6 themes: Matrix, Noir, Aurora, Ocean, Gold, Ice
- Year/month/week filters
- SVG embed API for GitHub READMEs: https://gitcity.natrajx.in/{username}.svg
- Zero auth required — username only

# Usage
Visit: https://gitcity.natrajx.in/{github-username}
Embed: ![GitCity](https://gitcity.natrajx.in/{username}.svg)

# Tech stack
React 18, Vite 5, Three.js r128, GitHub GraphQL API, Vercel Serverless

# Source code
https://github.com/natrajx/gitcity
